programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. programme.desc: French Connections revolves around France, its top stories and news, its experience in various spheres and cultural life, sport events, health care and education, cuisine and so much more. programme.title: E752
programme.desc: Sayali desires a fairytale romance, but fate intertwines her with Sachin, a complex figure. Will her dreams of a perfect life survive this unexpected connection?

programme.title: We Are Superheroes!
programme.desc: It's superhero time as the doctors' alter-egos go into battle to show the secret powers of your skin, which uses Vitamin D from the sun to make your bones strong! And Dr. Raph is on duty for incredible eye surgery.

programme.title: Ruby's Smelly Foot
programme.desc: The Junior Vets are on the farm, hoping to discover some pregnant cows. Poor Fern, the lurcher, has been abandoned and needs a new home. Ruby, the lamb, has a smelly infected foot, and Johnny and Inel meet a dog who likes to join the family for dinner!

programme.title: I'm Seven Feet Tall
programme.desc: Did you know that most of us are seven feet tall? Seven of our own feet, that is. This episode shows how indirect measures can be used to establish relatively accurate estimates of body part dimensions. Are you seven feet tall, too?

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: Today, the Junior Vets meet some feisty meerkats who need their claws trimmed, but first, they've got to catch them. Ashanti, the elephant, gets his feet and tail cleaned. Johnny and Inel discover what you get when you cross a lion and a tiger.

programme.title: Trip to Morocco
programme.desc: Zoe is disgusted when she sees that Alim starts eating the chocolate mousse she prepared without a spoon. Soon after, they travel to Morocco and learn more about the eating customs there.

programme.title: Sensational Solubles!
programme.desc: Eric is not sure what soluble means. To find out, he makes a snow globe and compares things that are soluble in water with things that are not.

programme.title: Bucket
programme.desc: No place to sit? Do not worry, we have the most creative solution for you!

programme.title: Jesters
programme.desc: Lord Roach is feeling really down! His wife Geraldine goes out of her way to entertain him, bringing in acrobats, musicians, etc. But it's no good. Enter Little Lewis, dressed in his court jester costume and Lord Roach is very happy.

programme.title: The Recycling Bandit
programme.desc: Addison and her friends are distracted from their mission of making cool costumes for Ayrton Park's version of Comicon when someone or something starts messing with recycling bins all over the neighbourhood.

programme.title: Day of the Band
programme.desc: Ricky decides to form a band, but the instruments he orders don't quite fit the bill. That doesn't stop Ricky from making musically-themed art, including a paper cup boom box and a guitarist sculpture inspired by Giacometti.

programme.title: Cat Taxi
programme.desc: OEistein makes a cardboard cat taxi.

programme.title: Storybook Ending
programme.desc: When Vik reads a storybook to his friends, Yoko adds some magic that allows the kids to create new parts of the tale!

programme.title: Sail Car
programme.desc: How do you make a wind powered wonder wagon? You'll need a paper cup and the power of puff.

programme.title: Health Check-ups
programme.desc: Jamie and Nyatepe are helping vet Scott examine poorly dog Isla. Josh and Molly visit a newborn donkey. And alpacas are keeping Robyn and Bonte on their toes.

programme.title: The Keeper (Maddie Hinch) and The Explorer (Ranulph Fiennes)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, the world's best field hockey goalkeeper and Olympic gold medallist, Maddie Hinch, and the world's greatest living explorer, Ranulph Fiennes, share their record breaking journeys.

programme.title: The Survivor (Bear Grylls) and The Boss (Ursula Burns)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary, Bear Grylls shares his story of perseverance and how he became 'the world's best known survival expert', while Ursula Burns reflects on her journey to becoming the first Black woman CEO of a Fortune 500 company.

programme.title: Admirable Admiral
programme.desc: Eric learns that even if something is made from a material that is denser or heavier than water, it will float if it has the right shape. He makes a paper boat strong enough to carry toy cars without sinking.

programme.title: Vets On Duty
programme.desc: The Junior Vets check out some lovely lemurs, get up close with Fluffy, the python, and meet a vulture called Derek! Plus, some cute little piglets need help, and Johnny and Inel meet a singing dog.

programme.title: A Feisty Badger
programme.desc: Today Matilda, the horse, has surgery, and a cute but feisty badger needs help after being hit by a car. The Junior Vets release Timbuktu, the hedgehog, back into the wild, and Johnny and Inel find out how fish sleep and meet a dog with a passion for pop music.

programme.title: Wapiti's Wheely Good Waka
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts are preparing their waka for summer, but when Wapiti turns up in a wheelchair, they have to find a way to make the waka more accessible.

E25 - In Caen (Best Of)
programme.desc: The best moments of the show in Caen.

programme.title: E6 - Sylvie Brassard, Kitesurfing Guide In Australia
programme.desc: Guide and instructor, Sylvie Brassard left Canada to settle in Perth, Australia, where she runs a kitesurfing school. In Exmouth, a small locality much appreciated by fans of sail sports, she welcomes Iftu, a Fransaskois who has come to explore the Ningaloo Marine Park and Cape Range.

programme.title: E5 - Drug Trafficking/Avalanches/Craftspeople/Tiny Houses
programme.desc: On the agenda: the fight against drug trafficking in the Antilles; meeting the rescuers who intervene when avalanches strike; craftspeople facing competition from online commerce; a focus on the manufacturing of tiny houses in the Vosges...

programme.title: E1 - Martelange
programme.desc: To kick off the 2025 season, Adrien Joveneau highlights the town of Martelange, located on the Luxembourg border, known for its slate mining past and its wooded landscapes. The musical guest for this stop is the band Suarez, accompanied by Antoine Donneaux.

programme.title: E3 - Unusual Museums
programme.desc: Among the two hundred museums in the city of Paris, some are more confidential than others and belong to brands, associations, or private collectors. Yvan Hallouin explores the most surprising of them.

programme.title: E19 - Charente-Maritime Special Programme
programme.desc: Sebastien Lys uses eye and ear to fish for mullet; Brice Thomas shares his passion for producing salt. Collecting ray eggs with the association IODDE. Raphael Musseau, doctor in ecology, and Jean-Claude Barbraud, ornithologist at the Museum National d'Histoire Naturelle, follow white storks. Plus a visit to Marans.

programme.title: E7 - Terroirs Of Excellence In Franche-Comte, From The Jura Mountains To The Mon
programme.desc: From watchmakers to cooks to jewellers to guides: these enthusiasts protect and celebrate their region from the plateaus of the Jura mountains to the Montbeliard region. Turned towards nature and protection of natural resources, they also seek to promote the know-how of skilled tradesmen passed on from generation to generation.

programme.title: E9 - Survivors
programme.desc: Tory pays a price for defiance. Stingray does battle with his conscience. A celebratory night on the town takes a turn for Johnny, Daniel and Chozen.

programme.title: E2 - Strike First
programme.desc: Daniel is dismayed to find a new Cobra Kai dojo has been opened up. Johnny learns his dojo has to pass several safety requirements before he can actually start teaching.

programme.title: E5 - Counterbalance
programme.desc: Cobra Kai gains it's second student. Daniel has an intricate plan to get payback on Johnny. Miguel defends Samantha against Kyler during lunch break.

programme.title: E1 - Mercy, Part II
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Cobra Kai's win at the Under 18 All Valley Karate Championships, Johnny questions his dojo's philosophy and deals with a figure from his past. Daniel searches for the right way to respond to Cobra Kai's dominance.

programme.title: E2 - Back In Black
programme.desc: When Daniel starts teaching his first karate students, he questions whether he can fill Mr. Miyagi's shoes. Johnny invents some unorthodox training methods with help from an unlikely source.

programme.title: E10 - No Mercy
programme.desc: It's the first day of school at West Valley High but tensions between the two dojos have not cooled with the end of summer. And the rivalry between Daniel and Johnny comes to a head.

programme.title: E2 - Nature Vs Nurture
programme.desc: Daniel and Johnny team up to find Robby. Miguel faces an uncertain future. Kreese tries to bring Tory back to Cobra Kai.

programme.title: E8 - The Good, The Bad And The Badass
programme.desc: Informed that this year's All Valley Karate Tournament is being canceled, the three competing sensei attend a city council meeting to save it.

programme.title: E9 - Feel The Night
programme.desc: It's Christmastime in the Valley, and romance is in the air. Daniel and Miguel find unexpected common ground, and the Cobra Kai recruits go on a mission.

programme.title: E4 - Bicephaly
programme.desc: Kreese brings Terry back to Cobra Kai, but his former partner is not interested in repeating history. Johnny grows envious of Daniel mentoring Miguel.

programme.title: E5 - Match Point
programme.desc: Johnny and Daniel's dojo - and their fragile alliance - teeter on the brink of collapse when they agree to a winner-takes-all sensei showdown.

programme.title: E3 - Playing With Fire
programme.desc: Another enemy from Daniel's past resurfaces. After a spa day and some soul-searching, Sam comes to a decision about her future with Miguel.

programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile find a tiny lizard who wants to be just like Mr. Crocodile. // Winston tries to be the leader on a nature hike, but his high-tech gadget gets everyone lost in the woods.

programme.title: E222 - I'm Not A Barbababy Anymore
programme.desc: No! It's over! Barbidur is no longer a baby, he's a big boy now!

programme.title: E803 - Video Game Land A Monster Machine Super Special Part 2
programme.desc: Welcome to VIDEO GAME LAND! When Blaze and Crusher get zapped into a magic arcade machine, they must beat four epic levels to win the game and return back home. Are they up for the challenge? Or will this adventure end in a GAME OVER?!

programme.title: E108 - The Competition Prize / Marvelous Moustaches
programme.desc: The Barbabies win a touchpad. They all want to use it and snaffle it one after another. // Barbazoo collects photos of moustached celebrities. Unfortunately, it's impossible to find the last one: Charles Horseshoe-Furlip. He suspects a conspiracy...

programme.title: E108 - The Competition Prize / Marvelous Moustaches

programme.title: E503 - The Island Of Lost Treasure
programme.desc: Somewhere, on The Island of Lost Treasure, there are incredible riches just waiting to be discovered. And Blaze and Darington are determined to be the first to find them!

programme.title: E504 - Pups Save A High Flying Skye / Pups Go For The Gold
programme.desc: When Corny runs away from Farmer Al's Farm during a blackout, the pups need to light the way to get them home safely! // Uncle Otis is hurling down Jake's Mountain in a runaway mine car! Ryder and the Pups need to rescue him before it crashes.

programme.title: E205 - Ah! My Beautiful Castle / The Sand Is Running Away
programme.desc: During a bike ride, the Barbapapa family discovers an old medieval castle in ruins. // Barbapapa and Lolita were traveling in a balloon, but caught in a storm they ended up stranded on a deserted island.

programme.title: E717 - Super Wheels Vs. The Bubblemaker
programme.desc: Super Wheels to the rescue! When the Bubblemaker starts trapping everything in his trouble bubbles, Blaze and Sparkle have to become superheroes to save Axle City!

programme.title: E417 - Pups Save A Space Rock / Pups Save A Good Mayor
programme.desc: Everest, the Turbots and a Space Rock get trapped in a cave. // Mayor Goodway goes missing and Mayor Humdinger causes havoc in Adventure Bay.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. It presents 360 degree profiles of industry movers and shakers, tech mavericks and policymakers, and drills down on the stories behind their success, to give you clarity on what's happening in every facet of business.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: Ms Dhoni - The Untold Story
programme.desc: A boy from Ranchi, M S Dhoni, decides to pursue his dream of playing cricket for India despite initially working for the Indian Railways to please his father.

programme.title: Serving The Pope With Your Life - What It's Like To Be A Swiss Guard
programme.desc: Dario is 25, Swiss, and has just sworn to protect the Pope - even if it costs him his life. In this rare behind-the-scenes look, we follow him through Vatican City, past tourists and tradition, and into the inner workings of one of the world's oldest military units.

programme.title: Mental Health: Ill Or Just Wired Differently?
programme.desc: Is a lack of concentration a sign of ADHD? Is a spell of feeling down actually depression? In Good Shape looks at mental health and neurodiversity.

programme.desc: Why a German entrepreneur imports coffee beans by sailing ship, what moving from the U.S. to Italy is like, and the curious world of Swedish sweets.

programme.title: Under Taliban Control - Cricket Brings Hope To Divided Afghanistan
programme.desc: Afghanistan has become one of the world's top cricket nations, bringing hope to a country reeling from decades of crisis. The return of the Taliban means this development can only be celebrated by half the population - but Afghan women in exile are using cricket to resist. We join young players Jamal Stanikzai and Firooza Amiri, and national team player Gulbadin Naib, on a global cricket journey.

programme.title: Mental Health: Ill Or Just Wired Differently?
programme.desc: Is a lack of concentration a sign of ADHD? Is a spell of feeling down actually depression? In Good Shape looks at mental health and neurodiversity.

programme.title: Haiti - The Price Of Independence
programme.desc: Haiti gained independence from France in 1804 after a rebellion by the enslaved population. However, the French government forced the young state to make drastic financial reparations to its former colonists.

programme.desc: Why a German entrepreneur imports coffee beans by sailing ship, what moving from the U.S. to Italy is like, and the curious world of Swedish sweets.

programme.title: The Gothic Mystery - When Cathedrals Reached Up To The Heavens
programme.desc: Gothic architecture emerged in France in the 12th century. This architectural style revolutionized church construction, creating cathedrals that soared skywards. But where did the knowledge and technology for building these monuments come from?

programme.title: E1344 - Control Freak/A Holiday Story/The Drip/Standards & Practices/Belly Math
programme.desc: When the Titans run amok in the Tower's evidence room, Robin does everything he can to keep things under control.

programme.title: E46 - The Great Veggie War/Rexford's Nectar/Grizz's Doc/Triple T Tiger Lilies
programme.desc: The bears return to the Veggie Kingdom to visit their old friend Lima, only to find the kingdom at war with a familiar yet unexpected foe. Can the bears help save the veggie kingdom from total annihilation?

programme.title: E9 - B. Everyone Wants to Direct/Katz Kandy/Mondo Magic/Watch The Birdies/Le Quack Amnesia
programme.desc: A famous film director (actually a zombie) comes to the farm wanting to shoot his next film. Eustace accepts greedily when he is promised money, only to find that the film is just a pretext for the director and his zombie partner to devour Muriel.

programme.title: E29 - B. Nature/Salty Codgers/Knowledge/Love Monsters/Baby Hands
programme.desc: In order to get his powers back, Beast Boy returns to nature and finds it much harsher than he expects.

programme.title: E210 - Easter Egg Hunt
programme.desc: Tom and Jerry are collecting Easter eggs, Quacker hatches from one of the eggs and runs away from Tom. Jerry helps Quacker escape. Tom falls into the pond, Quacker and Jerry save Tom. They all share Easter basket treats in the end.

programme.title: E210 - Easter Egg Hunt
programme.desc: Tom and Jerry are collecting Easter eggs, Quacker hatches from one of the eggs and runs away from Tom. Jerry helps Quacker escape. Tom falls into the pond, Quacker and Jerry save Tom. They all share Easter basket treats in the end.

programme.title: E162 - Looney Tunes Cartoons Valentine's Extwavaganza/Bugs Bunny's Howl-O-Skreem Sppoktacula
programme.desc: It's love, Looney Tunes style!

programme.title: E5 - Panda's Date/Burrito
programme.desc: When a vendor at the Farmers' Market (Lucy) sticks Panda with an EpiPen, reviving him after an allergic reaction, Panda comes to in the arms of his dream girl. Panda tries to woo this woman of his dreams, but his brothers and his own insecurities get in the way.

programme.desc: The Great Era gives a wide selection of Phoenix outstanding documentaries, covering different topics and issues in question, and capturing life as it is.

programme.title: E3 - Underground
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo goes beneath it all to find five of the most unusual dining adventures below and beyond! Dive down twenty feet under the sea for North Atlantic seafood in Norway.

programme.title: E9 - Country Captain Chicken Stew
programme.desc: Chef Deborah makes country captain chicken stew, a flavourful Southern dish with an Indian influence, made with bone-in chicken, curry, tomatoes and coconut milk, served over rice noodles.

programme.title: Vanished In Death Valley
programme.desc: A teenage girl goes missing when her family's car breaks down in Death Valley. Her parents will need to make unlikely allies if they are to find their daughter before she disappears forever.

programme.title: E2 - Huang Biren, Yao Wen Long, Zong Zijie, Hong Ling

programme.title: E9 - On The Niigata Road 1
programme.desc: In Niigata, we started our trip from Murakami City in Kaetsu. We tried miso ramen and katsudon in Drive-in Fuji.

programme.title: E10 - On The Niigata Road 2
programme.desc: Our journey in Niigata Prefecture continues to Sanjo City, known for its metal processing industry.

programme.title: E5

programme.title: Drama Serial 'The Scent Of The Wind' Week 1
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E3 - Volcanoes
programme.desc: Volcanoes - how successful is mankind in the fight against this elemental force of nature?

programme.title: E5 - Waste
programme.desc: Searching for ways to minimize their carbon footprint, Zac and Darin visit a self-sustaining home and other businesses innovating to reduce waste.

programme.title: E3 - You Call That an Explosion?
programme.desc: Chris and Wayner forgo family time between performances to join local racer and wild man, Billy for an afternoon of shooting guns and blowing stuff up, while Brooke's mounting frustration doesn’t fare well for their return.

programme.title: E4 - Hot Rods and Speed Boats
programme.desc: The King Of The North drag race kicks off with Billy scrambling to prepare his hotrod for its race against Chris and the Jet Truck, in a challenge that will see the loser facing public humiliation.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: Jess pitches in where Cylon Rolling Acres as owner Leslie Svacina runs her direct-to-consumer goat meat business.

programme.title: E8 - D-Day
programme.desc: The Buffalo boys gather in Red Deer for Mikey’s D-Day tribute jump. Joe and Sam scout out the designated military drop zone over Abraham Lake in the Rockies only to discover the canyon is too narrow for the DC-3. So Joe cancels the whole thing—it’s too dangerous. Mikey uses Joe’s own philosophy against him: at Buffalo, there’s always a backup plan. Joe flies out to scout a new location for the drop on the lake but hits bad weather. As Joe is about to scrap the trip, twenty paratroopers from the Canadian and American armies arrive for the big jump and are ready to go. They board WZS and Joe takes off to a site he hasn’t scouted, in weather that just keeps getting worse. As they near the drop point, he finally calls it—no jump tonight. They turn back, with all the troops still on board. Mikey’s only hope is a narrow window first thing the next morning—but only if Joe gives the final okay.

programme.title: E4 - Schooled by a Girl Scout
programme.desc: When a 13-year-old girl scout needs help earning a primitive camping skills badge, Bear Grylls flies to the rescue… literally. Beth’s wisdom for life and the outdoors is beyond her years, but nothing can prepare her for what challenges bear has in store for this adventure.

programme.title: E1 - Sarah Gets Good News
programme.desc: After the success of her first restaurant in Goa, India, former Masterchef contestant Sarah Todd steps up to the challenge of opening a second restaurant, The Wine Rack in the heart of the urban metropolis, Mumbai.

programme.title: E6 - Terry and The Minigun
programme.desc: Can you really fire a GE Minigun handheld with ammunition held in a backpack (also seen on Captain America: Winter Soldier). Additionally, for one of our larger tests – can you actually chop down a jungle forest with a minigun? Actor Bill Duke – who co-starred with Arnold Schwarzenegger for the film and who’s character performed this weapon stunt – joins us to find out. But first, we have to build a jungle.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: In 2005, a high-profile case of a police officer who disappeared during a forest hike spawned urban legends about the existence of a gateway into another world. In 2016, those legends inspired popular internet novel Missing, which is now being adapted into an eerie supernatural thriller by first-time director and Fresh Wave alum Ronnie Chau. Former pop idol Gillian Chung stars as a social worker who hires a mountain guide to search for her missing father in the mountains. She discovers the mystical gateway from the urban legends, but is her father really waiting for her on the other side?

programme.title: Warm Hug
programme.desc: WARM HUG is a romance-comedy revolving around a boy with OCD and is not interested in both friendship and love. However, after meeting a unique doctor and a carefree girl, the three of them slowly learn and understand one another along the way...

programme.title: House of Fury
programme.desc: A mysterious person arrived in his wheelchair in Yue's Clinic and asked for a person called Tai Chi Lung. Later on, Yue was found disappeared, leaving behind his clinic a mess...

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E2 - When Everything Goes Hilariously Wrong!
programme.desc: Get ready to laugh as everything goes hilariously wrong for Kii & Yii & their friends! The chaos starts when Robot creates a jelly-making machine, but it goes haywire & he ends up stuck inside a giant wobbly jelly! Then, Princess Cat puts way too much soap in her washing machine, causing it to overflow & fill her entire castle with bubbles! From a wobbly tooth to a picky eater, it's one funny problem after another!

programme.title: E3 - What Will Cody Do Today?
programme.desc: What will Cody do today? Every day is a new adventure! He might move to a new house with his family & cat, Pickles. Or maybe he'll find a simple empty cardboard box & use his imagination to turn it into a turtle shell, a drum & a race car! He could go on a hike with JJ & race walnut sailboats, or stay home & sing the ABCs over a big pot of alphabet soup. With Cody, you never know what fun you'll have!

programme.title: E5 - JJ Learns to Share, Help & Be Kind!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to share, help & be kind! First, he learns the magic words 'please' & 'thank you,' & what to do when you make a mistake. The lessons continue as JJ, YoYo & TomTom show how much fun it is to share their snacks & toys. Being kind also means being helpful, & JJ's family loves to help each other around the house. From using good manners at the table to learning how to wait in line, it's a day of learning to be a good friend & family member!

programme.title: E1 - When Baby Daniel Causes Total Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some total mayhem caused by Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel finds the remote to control Arpo, turning the robot babysitter into everything from an elephant to a bird! Then, Arpo is tasked with cleaning the kitchen, but Daniel just wants to play, making an even bigger mess. From getting covered in mud to being extra noisy while Daddy is trying to sleep, Baby Daniel keeps Arpo on his toes in this fun-filled, chaotic adventure!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 故事背景設定在不久的將來，在這個世界中，人們過去的性關係通過一條發光的紅色「S線」在他們頭頂上方以視覺方式連接。一位刑警、一位神秘的老師，以及一個天生能看到這些線的少女，共同應對由這一現象引發的系列令人不安的事件。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.desc: 故事背景設定在不久的將來，在這個世界中，人們過去的性關係通過一條發光的紅色「S線」在他們頭頂上方以視覺方式連接。一位刑警、一位神秘的老師，以及一個天生能看到這些線的少女，共同應對由這一現象引發的系列令人不安的事件。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

E202 - Mutantweight Title Bout
programme.desc: All of Raph's dreams have come true as he fights Rocksteady, Bebop, and Mondo Gecko in the underground Mutant Battle Arena. But he doesn't realize he's walked right into a trap set by Kitsune and her street gang, the Purple Dragons!

programme.title: E247 - Swamp Mates / One Trick Sponge
programme.desc: Bubble Bass finds himself stranded with Patrick in a mysterious swamp, looking for a lost action figure. // SpongeBob learns a new magic trick, but he can't find anyone to watch it.

programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E513 - Hurl, Interrupted / Diamonds are for Never
programme.desc: Lynn tries to stall her friends from riding the new coaster at Dairyland before they find out her big secret. // After Lola and Mr. Grouse find a precious gem, the two struggle to decide who gets to watch over it.

programme.title: E406 - We Smurfed on the Moon
programme.desc: Leaf has a new and very powerful magic wand, the only problem is that she doesn't know how to use it. She makes a mistake and turns off the moon! The Smurfs decide to fly to the moon to turn it back on again. But it won't be an easy mission.

programme.title: E14 - 沈騰安宇對唱全是技巧
programme.desc: 出發團老成員沈騰、白敬亭、金晨、賈冰、胡先煦、王安宇、范丞丞攜手再次奔赴自然秘境，沉浸式領略各地的美麗風景；以「金木水火土」為主題線索，踏上野外探險之旅，將旅行與挑戰深度綁定，足跡從西藏林芝、齊齊哈爾等國內秘境延伸至海外極端環境。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E21 - 年度盛典 (上)
programme.desc: 將繼續以「音樂牽線，緣分發聲」為主題，賽制上進行了全面創新升級，帶來更具懸念的緣分匹配設定、更多元的趣味互動模式，以及更動人的團隊默契考驗；匯聚周深、薛之謙、單依純等10位實力歌手與新銳音樂人，通過盲選歌單、即興創作等環碰撞靈感，打造專屬合作舞台！

programme.title: E14 - 沈騰安宇對唱全是技巧
programme.desc: 出發團老成員沈騰、白敬亭、金晨、賈冰、胡先煦、王安宇、范丞丞攜手再次奔赴自然秘境，沉浸式領略各地的美麗風景；以「金木水火土」為主題線索，踏上野外探險之旅，將旅行與挑戰深度綁定，足跡從西藏林芝、齊齊哈爾等國內秘境延伸至海外極端環境。

programme.title: E1 - Greater Kuala Lumpur
programme.desc: In bustling Malaysia, lunch is not just a meal - it is a window into people's lives. Chinese tutor (Kairesh) takes us to the original chili pan mee creators, a devoted teacher shares her 20-minute lunch ritual, and a Gen Z introduces us to a modern Malaysian cafe that has redefined local flavours.

programme.title: Unlocked
programme.desc: Unlocked is a home tour series focused on how much people across the globe spend on their housing, what they get for the money and what they had to sacrifice to make it happen. CNBC opens the doors to unique homes and introduces you to the people inside so you can see what it's like to live there and exactly how much it costs.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: E2 - Life Givers
programme.desc: Learn how bees, butterflies, moths, and other pollinators keep our fields and forests fruitful, and weigh what life would be like if these busy bugs vanished. Witness a mysterious butterfly pilgrimage and a moth’s clever way of escaping hungry bats.

programme.title: E1 - How to Catch a Lizard
programme.desc: Tag along as Dr. Amanda rescues a blind pet baboon, and watch Dr. Charlotte’s tricky surgery on a pangolin whose leg must be amputated after a run-in with poachers. Later, chase a rhino, two young baboons gone AWOL, and a fiesty monitor lizard.

programme.title: E2 - Life Givers
programme.desc: Learn how bees, butterflies, moths, and other pollinators keep our fields and forests fruitful, and weigh what life would be like if these busy bugs vanished. Witness a mysterious butterfly pilgrimage and a moth’s clever way of escaping hungry bats.

programme.title: E2 - Winged Weirdos
programme.desc: One uses a mustache to attract mates and another has a bill so big, it needs special vertebrae to carry it. Learn how nature's flying iconoclasts have evolved their appearance in order to survive.

programme.title: E1 - Spring
programme.desc: In Southern Africa, Spring starts in early September and the natural world stirs into life. Days begin to lengthen, temperatures rise, and animals and plants combine in an orchestrated effort to reproduce, give birth and raise their young.

programme.title: E10 - Path of the Matriarch
programme.desc: In southern India, the summer is a challenge for Asian elephants who must drink every day. As things dry up, Anura, the matriarch, leads her herd to a distant watering hole. But will she succeed in getting her 3-month-old grandson there in time?

programme.title: E1 - Born to Be Different
programme.desc: This episode of Amazing Animal Friends features a duck that won’t go in the water without a ride from her pooch pal, an elephant that thinks she’s a buffalo, and a herd of cows that adopt an orphaned deer.

programme.title: E2 - Adapt Or Die
programme.desc: Feel the heat when the pride tries to hunt down adequate food as drought conditions push them (and their prey) dangerously close to death. Watch Einstein adapt to solo life, then assess the damage after new mom Kalwezi fights for her cubs’ lives.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2:2025-2026
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: E14 - Hide'n'seek Rabbits
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: E8 - Write To Remember
programme.desc: Julie Provencher is a mother passionate about education. With her, it's impossible to get bored! In each episode, she gives tips and tricks to parents so they can educate their children while having fun.

programme.title: E11 - Puppet Promotion
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: E81 - Valentin Vacherot, Benjamin Balleret
programme.desc: He's the player of the moment, surprise winner of the ATP Masters 1000 in Shanghai, Monegasque tennis player Valentin Vacherot and his coach Benjamin Balleret join Pierre Classen.

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: E2 - Hugo Servanin/Lou De Pray

programme.desc: Fiona secretly loves her stepbrother Alfie, a feeling she has kept hidden even after their families separated. programme.title: Hitman
programme.desc: With a box of worthless war bonds, an old man hired the King of Killers to assassinate a Japanese trade lord. In WWII, the trade lord's action had caused grave damage to the family of the King of Killers. He agrees to take the job and delivers in a few days. The Revenge Fund set up by the trade lord kicks in. Whoever avenges the trade lord's death, killing the killer and the force behind him, will receive a reward of $1 billion. The police assigns Inspector to watch the killers, with orders to leave them room when they kill each other. Among the killers vying for the reward are Fu, a new immigrant, and his agent, Wong a longtime loser trying to score a big one riding on Fu's coat-tail. After an elaborately orchestrated chain of events, Wong and Fu manage to accomplish their goal.

programme.title: Armageddon
programme.desc: As Ken (Andy Lau), one of the surviving scientists, tries to solve the unsolvable, he is haunted by the reappearance of his dead finace Adele (Michelle Reis).

programme.desc: With a box of worthless war bonds, an old man hired the King of Killers to assassinate a Japanese trade lord. In WWII, the trade lord's action had caused grave damage to the family of the King of Killers. He agrees to take the job and delivers in a few days. The Revenge Fund set up by the trade lord kicks in. Whoever avenges the trade lord's death, killing the killer and the force behind him, will receive a reward of $1 billion. The police assigns Inspector to watch the killers, with orders to leave them room when they kill each other. Among the killers vying for the reward are Fu, a new immigrant, and his agent, Wong a longtime loser trying to score a big one riding on Fu's coat-tail. After an elaborately orchestrated chain of events, Wong and Fu manage to accomplish their goal.

programme.title: E9 - In The Belly Of The Earth
programme.desc: Teams continue racing in Slovenia, carefully traveling on foot-carrying wooden pieces on their back, descending deep into a cave and assembling a giant dragon and scraping off mussels and barnacles in the waters.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Superhumans defy a government plot to harness and abuse their powers. Chris Evans and Dakota Fanning (the TWILIGHT films) team up in a pulse-pounding paranormal thriller.

programme.title: E4 - Murder On The Dance Floor
programme.desc: Tess and Sunny must break the facade of a tight-knit family when the city is shaken by what appears to be a rare mother-daughter murder suicide at a dance academy. With Jake on another case, Tess and Leo struggle for control as they track down an elusive prodigy killer, under the watch of overly enthusiastic new sub detective OWEN COOPER. Meanwhile Sunny finds evidence that a mysterious intruder is breaking into her home when she sleeps, and Matt and Mia discover they have unexpected chemistry

programme.title: E5 - Poetic Justice
programme.desc: After a donor's death shakes New York's nonprofit arts scene, Elsbeth questions the motives of the victim's friend, Gary, the founder of a prominent poetry journal. Also, Elsbeth runs into her old friend Marissa Gold.

E38
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 侯文詠原著小說改編，兩段糾結的情感，交織出一場關於「選擇」的情愛旅程。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 《愛很美味》講述了三位個性迥異、特色鮮明的都市麗人，在經歷了一系列創業的艱辛，職場的壓迫，和感情的波折後，對生活、事業和愛情都有了重新的認識。

programme.title: One World (45M): Friday, April 3, 2026 12Pm ET
